articles.title: Why RAM Is So Expensive in 2026 - And What PC Buyers Should Do
articles.description: RAM prices have surged dramatically, driven by AI demand and supply constraints. Here’s what’s behind the spike, how long it could last, and what PC builders should do next.
articles.content: If you’ve been planning a PC build or even browsing pre-built systems, you’ve likely run into the same issue: RAM prices are unusually high. In some cases, costs have increased by as much as 500%, pushing up overall system prices and making builds ha... [4512 chars]

articles.title: Nvidia hits $5 trillion in market cap, solidifies position as AI's kin
articles.description: The chipmaker reclaimed its title as the world's most valuable company after a rough stretch of months.
articles.content:
Nvidia Corp. shares rose to their first record in months on Friday, the latest example of improving momentum at the leader in artificial intelligence chips.
Shares gained 4.3% to $208.26 amid a broad semiconductor rally, taking out a record that had ... [2596 chars]

articles.title: DOJ Backs Musk's xAI In Fight Against Colorado AI Law, Calls It 'Woke DEI'
articles.description: The DOJ is joining xAI's lawsuit against Colorado to block enforcement of a law imposing heavy operational demands on AI companies.
articles.content:
The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) is joining xAI's lawsuit against the state of Colorado, seeking to stop the state from enforcing a law that would impose significant operational demands on companies building AI products.

articles.title: Energy raises $1.02B in record nuclear IPO as Amazon
articles.description: X-Energy's $1.02B IPO was 15x oversubscribed and priced 21% above range. The same company failed to close a SPAC at $1B in 2023. AI data centre demand changed everything.
articles.content: In short: X-Energy raised $1.02 billion in the largest nuclear IPO on record, pricing at $23 (21% above range) on the Nasdaq, with shares surging 31% on opening to imply a $12 billion market cap. The offering was 15x oversubscribed. The same company ... [7652 chars]

articles.title: L&T Finance Reports Strong Q4FY26 Results with 27% Jump in Net Profit to ₹807 Cr
articles.description: L&T Finance delivered exceptional Q4FY26 performance with net profit rising 27% to ₹807 Cr and retail disbursements surging 62% to ₹24,107 Cr. The company achieved 98% retailisation target, maintained strong asset quality with credit cost at 2.64%, and continued advancing digital initiatives including AI-powered underwriting systems.

articles.title: Trump DOJ Backs Elon Musk's xAI in Fight Over Colorado AI Bias Law
articles.description: The Justice Department moved to intervene in xAI’s lawsuit challenging Colorado’s algorithmic discrimination law.
articles.content:

articles.title: YouTube offers deepfake detection to Hollywood
articles.description: YouTube is offering Hollywood celebrities and entertainers a free detection tool to help combat their deepfakes, expanding the Google-owned video platform's efforts to guard against AI-driven impersonations.
